question: Looking at the US population map, which statement below is the most accurate?

options.A: The population gap between Virginia and Illinois might exceed that between Maryland and New York.
options.B: Virginia and Illinois have similar populations.
options.C: The population differences are impossible to determine from this visualization.
options.D: All highlighted states have nearly identical population levels.

explanation: Virginia (35.5M) and Illinois (48.6M) have a 13.1M population difference, while Louisiana (4.6M) and Mississippi (5.2M) have only a 0.6M difference. However, the categorical color encoding groups Virginia and Illinois into the same color bin (30M+ range), making their large difference appear similar, while Louisiana and Mississippi appear more different due to different color bins.
